'''Mike Burnett''' (born 6 October 1988) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 2000s and 2010s for [[Hull F.C.]] and the [[London Broncos#2006–2011: Harlequins Rugby League|Harlequins RL]] in the [[Super League]]. His position of choice was as a {{rlp|sr}}.

==Background==
Burnett was born in [[Kingston upon Hull]], [[Humberside]], England.

==Career==
He was forced to retire from rugby league in 2012 due to a back injury.<ref>{{cite web|title=Hull FC prop Mike Burnett announces retirement|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/20324256|website=BBC Sport|access-date=18 January 2015|date=14 November 2012}}</ref>
